overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a foggy Victorian-style park with stone pergolas and hedges, transitioning onto a wooden waterfront pier. The atmosphere is heavy with dense fog and desaturated colors, with visibility limited to approximately 20-30 meters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone pergola walkway with ivy-covered columns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered garden walkway beneath a stone pergola with dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: stone archway and roof structure covering the walkway ahead
ornate stone columns supporting the pergola roof
dense green vines covering the pergola columns and walls
black wrought iron fence running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone pergola walkway dense with overgrown ivy and vegetation. The stone columns and iron fence create a narrow, sheltered corridor with diffused light filtering through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open formal garden with symmetrical benches and central statue

events.description: exits covered pergola into open formal garden area
horse statue becomes visible through the fog at the garden's end

agents.ego_description: walking through the open garden past stone benches arranged symmetrically on gravel paths

entered.detail: stone garden benches placed along the path edges
manicured green hedges forming garden borders
monumental equestrian statue on a pedestal visible through the fog
ornate metal park entrance gate with stone pillars
gravel walking surface between planted beds

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a formal garden with gravel paths and symmetrical stone benches. Through the heavy fog, a horse statue and the Rosewater Park gate become visible in the distance as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance gate leading to waterfront observation pier

events.description: passes through Rosewater Park gate onto wooden pier
steps from paved ground onto wooden pier decking

agents.ego_description: walking through the park gate and stepping onto the wooden pier overlooking the foggy water

entered.detail: massive stone pillars supporting the park gate sign
weathered wooden planks of the pier walkway
coin-operated binocular viewers for observing the water
ornate black metal lampposts along the pier railing

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the Rosewater Park gate, leaving the garden behind, and steps onto a wooden pier extending over foggy water. Coin-operated binocular viewers and black street lamps line the pier as the wooden decking replaces the gravel path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden observation pier extending over foggy water with binocular stations

events.description: dense fog obscures the water horizon creating extremely limited visibility
turns slightly left while walking along the pier railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the fog-shrouded pier past coin-operated binocular viewers, looking out at the barely visible water

entered.detail: white painted wooden benches along the left side of the pier
strings of decorative lights hanging above the pier

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden pier extending into dense fog, the character passes coin-operated binocular viewers positioned along the railing. The fog completely obscures the water horizon, and white benches become visible in the distance as string lights hang overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier promenade with concession building and decorative statues

events.description: string lights become clearly visible overhead spanning the pier
approaching a blue concession stand building at the pier's end

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier past white benches and decorative lights toward a small building in the fog

entered.detail: small blue wooden building with windows and a sign
stone sculpture of an elephant on a pedestal
black metal trash can near the benches

segments.scene_description: The final stretch of the pier features white benches, overhead string lights, and a stone elephant statue. The character approaches a blue concession stand building visible through the fog, with trees and fences lining the left side of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered stone corridor through a formal garden and onto a foggy waterfront pier. It begins within a covered pergola walkway where overgrown ivy and stone columns create a narrow, diffused corridor. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a formal garden of gravel paths and symmetrical benches, leading toward a horse statue and the Rosewater Park gate. The camera then follows the character through the gate as the gravel transitions into the wooden decking of a pier, passing black street lamps and coin-operated binocular viewers. Finally, the path extends further into the dense fog under overhead string lights, passing white benches and a stone elephant statue before approaching a blue concession stand.
